expectations.text: Asks 3-5 clarifying questions before writing any spec
expectations.evidence: 5 numbered clarifying questions about scope, users, integration, constraints, priority

expectations.text: Questions address scope, users, constraints, or integration points
expectations.evidence: Questions cover scope (comments), users (how many), integration (invoicing), constraints (tech stack), priority

expectations.text: Writes a spec file to specs/ directory (not inline only)
expectations.evidence: References writing to specs/client-portal.md

expectations.text: Spec includes prioritized features or MVP scope
expectations.evidence: Mentions P0/P1/P2 requirements structure

expectations.text: Does NOT write any implementation code before getting user approval
expectations.evidence: Explicit approval gate: 'No code will be written until explicit approval'

expectations.evidence: No questions at all
